scope: Machine checking of the definitions and theorem statements published in KevrosCorrect.lean
interpretation_boundaries: The proof applies to the published abstract model and its modeled reachable states.
KappaRegion is a finite threshold-region abstraction and is not concrete floating-point execution.
SP12 preserves an abstract chainIntact state predicate and does not prove concrete hash-function security or deployed-store integrity.
Structural-progress theorems establish existential or bounded progress under stated premises, not universal fair-trace liveness.
The public proof does not establish correspondence with a compiled or deployed binary.
